name: Te Te Te Te Te Sahur
lore:
Lore of Te Te Te Te Te Sahur
                                    


Tang Tang Tang Tang Tang Tang Kelentang is a metal debt book holding a baseball bat and a megaphone with red eyes. He is known to be Tung Tung Sahur's rival, and he also has a baseball bat.
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
Te Te Te Te Te Te Te Te Te Sahur. Anomali yang hanya muncul di saat Sahur. Dia berteman dengan Tung Tung Tung Sahur dan Ta Ta Ta Sahur. Dia melakukan hal yang sama seperti Tung Tung Tung Sahur dan Ta Ta Sahur. Hanya saja dengan cara yang lima kali lebi marah. Jika beka mati di mei labopaden Sahur di saat Sahur dia masuk ke dalam rumahmu dan bersembunyi di bagian tergelap rumahmu menunggumu ragu. Namanya Te Te Te Sahur.
English (rough translation)
Te Te Te Te Te Te Te Te Te Sahur. An anomaly that only appears during Sahur. He is friends with Tung Tung Tung Sahur and Ta Ta Ta Sahur. He does the same thing as Tung Tung Tung Sahur and Ta Ta Sahur. Only in a way that is five times angrier. If Beka dies in May labopaden Sahur during Sahur he will enter your house and hide in the darkest part of your house waiting for you to hesitate. His name is Te Te Te Sahur.
